view.title: Validate explicit UC need #11

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 11 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the new customer onboarding sequence.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the new customer onboarding sequence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of a specific onboarding sequence for new customers, which includes multiple email touchpoints over a 30-day period. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence or functionality of this onboarding sequence. As a result, it is not possible to determine if the requirement is satisfied or if there are gaps in the implementation.
